puzzle.title: The Enigma of the Great Flood
puzzle.intro: In a time of great disobedience and corruption, a faithful servant of Allah faced an immense challenge. With a heavy heart, he warned his people of the impending doom, but they turned a deaf ear. This story unfolds with trials, perseverance, and a miraculous event that changed the course of humanity.
clues: Clue 1: This story involves a significant warning to a sinful community.
Clue 2: The main figure is known for his unwavering faith amidst ridicule.
Clue 3: A massive construction plays a pivotal role in this narrative.
Clue 4: This event is often associated with a divine punishment in the form of water.
Clue 5: The figure's plea to his people was met with mockery and disbelief.
Clue 6: This prophet is famously known for building an ark to save himself and the believers.
puzzle.verse: And We certainly saved Noah and those with him in the laden ark, and We drowned the others. Indeed, in that is a sign, and most of them were not to be believers. (Surah Al-Mu'minun: 27)
puzzle.arabic: وَأَنْجَيْنَا نُوحًا وَالَّذِينَ مَعَهُ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ ۖ وَغَرَقْنَا الْآخَرِينَ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
